tasks.subject: Task 0: Generate zen garden hero stills via Nano Banana
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generate 4 cinematic digital zen garden stills via mcp__nano-banana__generate_image, save to public/images/hero/, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/images/hero/zen-01.png", "public/images/hero/zen-02.png", "public/images/hero/zen-03.png", "public/images/hero/zen-04.png"], "verifyCommand": "ls public/images/hero/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 png files exist", "landscape orientation", "consistent scene progression", "ink+warm palette"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Rewrite Hero.tsx as cinematic crossfading slideshow
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Full rewrite of src/components/sections/Hero.tsx with crossfading slideshow, Ken Burns, new headline, CTAs. Export name Hero preserved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sections/Hero.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["export Hero preserved", "4 slides crossfade", "ken burns zoom", "new headline+CTAs", "priority first image", "phase 1 tokens", "dots work", "build+lint green"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Visual smoke test + user verification for Phase 2 Hero
tasks.description:
**Goal:** User visually verifies Phase 2 Hero via AskUserQuestion before Phase 3.

**User Verification Required:** Must call AskUserQuestion with verification prompt before marking complete.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dev ready", "hero renders", "crossfade smooth", "ken burns visible", "headline readable", "CTAs styled", "dots work", "JA toggle works", "no regressions", "user sign-off"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "Phase 2 Hero is live. Do the AI-generated stills look cinematic, does the crossfade feel smooth, and does the new headline read strong — with no regressions below the fold?"}
```
